/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cube.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cube.dir/src/main.c.o -o cube  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/bin:/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/bin/lib/glfw-3.4/src:/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/bin/lib/glad ../../liblsgfw.so /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a ../../lib/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw.so.3.4 ../../lib/glad/libglad.so
